name: Old Fashioned Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse a medium saucepan with cold water (do not dry); pour in the milk and bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Stir in the rice and return to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered until the rice is tender, about 55 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the cream, sugar, egg yolks, vanilla, and salt.
5. Set aside. When the rice is tender, stir in the cream mixture until completely combined; heat to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and pour into a 2-quart serving dish. Sprinkle the top generously with cinnamon. Chill at least 4 hours.
